eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 10:12 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 2:12 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office- Level 3 GO NOW evacuation notice  for JAC-017 West Fork Evans Creek rd and East Evans Creek rd due to Evans Creek Road Fire. Continue to monitor official news sources for evacuation and incident information.
